entries.original_str: 2. Align your Revealer borderlines to the dashed lines on the top and left.
entries.translation: 2. Align your Revealer borderlines to the dashed lines on the top and left.

entries.original_str: 4. Type the numbers in the software
entries.translation: 4. Type the numbers in the software

entries.original_str: A backup is saved automatically when generating a new wallet.
entries.translation: A backup is saved automatically when generating a new wallet.

entries.original_str: A copy of your wallet file was created in
entries.translation: A copy of your wallet file was created in

entries.original_str: A small fee will be charged on each transaction that uses the remote server.  You may check and modify your billing preferences once the installation is complete.
entries.translation: A small fee will be charged on each transaction that uses the remote server.  You may check and modify your billing preferences once the installation is complete.

entries.original_str: A suggested fee is automatically added to this field. You may override it. The suggested fee increases with the size of the transaction.
entries.translation: A suggested fee is automatically added to this field. You may override it. The suggested fee increases with the size of the transaction.

entries.original_str: Add a cosigner to your multi-sig wallet
entries.translation: Add a cosigner to your multi-sig wallet

entries.original_str: Additional {} satoshis are going to be added.
entries.translation: Additional {} satoshis are going to be added.

entries.original_str: Also, dust is not kept as change, but added to the fee.
entries.translation: Also, dust is not kept as change, but added to the fee.

entries.original_str: Amount for OP_RETURN output must be zero.
entries.translation: Amount for OP_RETURN output must be zero.

entries.original_str: An uninitialized Digital Bitbox is detected.
entries.translation: An uninitialized Digital Bitbox is detected.

entries.original_str: Are you SURE you want to wipe the device?\nYour wallet still has bitcoins in it!
entries.translation: Are you SURE you want to wipe the device?\nYour wallet still has bitcoins in it!

entries.original_str: Are you sure you want to erase the Digital Bitbox?
entries.translation: Are you sure you want to erase the Digital Bitbox?

entries.original_str: Are you sure you want to proceed?
entries.translation: Are you sure you want to proceed?

entries.original_str: Are you sure you want to remove this transaction and {} child transactions?
entries.translation: Are you sure you want to remove this transaction and {} child transactions?

entries.original_str: Are you sure you want to remove this transaction?
entries.translation: Are you sure you want to remove this transaction?
